text: Blessed are the pure in heart, for they shall see God.
Create in me a clean heart, O God, and put a new and right spirit within me.
Create in me a clean heart, O God.
Keep your heart with all vigilance; for from it flow the springs of life.
God is faithful, and he will not let you be tempted beyond your strength, but with the temptation will also provide the way of escape.
Watch and pray that you may not enter into temptation; the spirit indeed is willing, but the flesh is weak.
I can do all things in him who strengthens me.
My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness.
The steadfast love of the Lord never ceases, his mercies never come to an end; they are new every morning.
If any one is in Christ, he is a new creation; the old has passed away, behold, the new has come.
Blessed is the man who endures trial, for when he has stood the test he will receive the crown of life.
Let us run with perseverance the race that is set before us, looking to Jesus.
I have laid up thy word in my heart, that I might not sin against thee.
Your body is a temple of the Holy Spirit... So glorify God in your body.
Present your bodies as a living sacrifice, holy and acceptable to God.
